communications.subject: Nevada Public Records Act Request: NHD 9% LIHTC lists
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Nevada Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

(1) lists of all 9% LIHTC competitive round applications received for the following six cycles: 2018 Round Two, 2020, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025.

(2) lists of all 9% LIHTC competitive round reservations for the following five cycles: 2018 Round One, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024.

Regarding the former, I am seeking the equivalent application lists to the ones published in other years, such as 2021: https://housing.nv.gov/uploadedFiles/housingnewnvgov/Content/Programs/LIT/2021%20LIHTC%20Applications%20Received.xlsx.

Regarding the latter, I am seeking equivalent reservation lists to the ones published in other years, such as 2025: https://housing.nv.gov/uploadedFiles/housingnewnvgov/Content/Programs/LIT/2025LIHTCAppsReservations20250731.xlsx.

Please note that the housing.nv.gov website was checked in advance of reaching out, and this request is in search of those records which could not be located online.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Lars Brown
